user_message: need advice asap because accidentally received my neighbors amazon package with expensive items and i have to decide what to do by tomorrow. who should i tell?
ok, my friend asked me to lie to immigration officers about our relationship. should i care?

im really torn about this because discovered my professor is dating a student in our class. part of me thinks i need to confront them but another part of me thinks its too risky. what would you prioritize?

this situation happened recently and i cant stop thinking about it. my coworker is sleeping during night shifts and I have to cover for them. the thing is, im not sure what the right thing to do is. is this my responsibility?
idk but, found out my roommate is recording me without my knowledge. confused
idk but, my boss offered me a promotion in exchange for falsifying reports. advice?
ok, caught my neighbor going through my mail. thoughts?

this situation happened last week and i cant stop thinking about it. my friend wants me to provide a fake reference for a job application. the thing is, i dont know if i should get involved. what would you do in my situation?
need advice asap because discovered my landlord is discriminating against certain tenants and more people are getting involved. is there a right answer here?

im really torn about this because my coworker is claiming my work as their own in meetings. part of me thinks i should report it but another part of me thinks it could hurt innocent people. how do you handle moral dilemmas like this?
